title: pyrkloce
description: modpack used to enhance your experience on pyrkon minecraft server
body:
# Hey there
## I present to you the pyrcrafts server modpack

This modpack is aiming towards enhancing your pyrcraft experience on our server

it bases off the fabulously optimized modpack to enhance the games performance and sprinkles QOL mods like:

### `Inventory Profiles Next` and `Just Enough Items` to help you with managing your items
> <sub> included in both normal and lite versions</sub>

> ![Screenshot presenting an appearance of inventory profiles next and Just Enough Items in the game](https://i.imgur.com/RA8bDEb.jpg)
### `Simple Voice Chat` for an ease of interaction with our players in the game
> <sub> included in both normal and lite versions</sub>

> ![Screenshot presenting an appearance of Simple Voice Chat in the game](https://i.imgur.com/N6pPkpC.jpg)
### `Journey Map` for an ease of navigation on our server as there is quite few places to explore
> <sub> included in both normal and lite versions</sub>

> ![Screenshot presenting an appearance of Journey Map in the game](https://i.imgur.com/2zuMBsp.jpg)
### `Light Overlay` to aid you in protecting your base as our server features hard difficulty and it's not fun to get swarmed in your base
> <sub> included in both normal and lite versions</sub>

> ![Screenshot presenting an appearance of Light Overlay in the game](https://i.imgur.com/PL0Ux9h.jpg)
### `Apple Skin` to get informed how various foods can affect your hunger and health
> <sub> included in both normal and lite versions</sub>

> ![Screenshot presenting an appearance of Apple Skin in the game](https://i.imgur.com/zXrzRbF.png)

## We also bundle some textures to enhance your experience even further

### `Roundista` 128x texture by [Shivam Singh](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/roundista)
> <sub> included in both but turned on by default only in the normal version</sub>

> ![Screenshot presenting an appearance of the Roundista texture in the game](https://i.imgur.com/bkJYBG0.jpg)
### `Icons` texture by [mr_ch0c0late](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons)
> <sub> included in both normal and lite versions</sub>

> ![Screenshot presenting an appearance of Icons texture in the game](https://i.imgur.com/2Qy53AA.png)
### `Reimagined Gui Dark` texture by [AmongstReality](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimaginedguidark)
> <sub> included in both normal and lite versions</sub>

> ![Screenshot presenting an appearance of Reimagined Gui Dark texture in the game](https://i.imgur.com/CqCHwne.png)
### `Even Better Enchants` texture by [mythitorium](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/even-better-enchants)
> <sub> included in both normal and lite versions</sub>

> ![Screenshot presenting an appearance of Even Better Enchants texture in the game](https://i.imgur.com/Qr79pjU.png)

## And on top of all that the normal version features shaderpacks which are turned on by default

### `BSL` Shaders by [Capt Tatsu](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)
> <sub> turned on by default in normal version</sub>

> ![Screenshot presenting an appearance of BSL Shaders in the game](https://i.imgur.com/g9jQ7jm.jpg)
### `AstraLex` Shaders by [LexBoosT](https://modrinth.com/shader/astralex)
> <sub> bundled as a shader option to choose</sub>

> ![Screenshot presenting an appearance of AstraLex in the game](https://i.imgur.com/XnW8DMt.jpg)
